productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Upgrades Analog White Black Watch
description: Stylish to the hilt, this fastrack analog wrist watch is a great buy for those who enjoy performance and style. With excellent touches and comfort, this watch makes for an excellent daily wear.Case diameter: 35 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: Round Aluminium case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Leather strap with a tang clasp White dial with a black lining from the 9 o& rsquo clock to 3 o& rsquo clock position, hours numbered at 5,6 and 7 o& rsquo clock positions and brand logo at 3 o& rsquo clock position Quartz movement of time display with a stylish hour hand Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance at 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when swimming
